title: Marketing Analyst
company: AgileGrid Solutions (actual employer: trendtours Touristik GmbH)
location: Eschborn near Frankfurt, Germany (up to 2 days remote)
required_skills: Degree or vocational training in Marketing, Business Administration, Statistics or related field
Proven experience with analysis tools: Google Analytics, Power BI, Excel, SQL
Solid understanding of statistical models and procedures (regression analysis)
Structured, independent working style with solution-oriented mindset and strong numerical affinity
Experience managing large datasets and working with data warehousing solutions
Excellent communication skills and strong analytical thinking
matched_skills: Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300) — direct hit on required tool
Google Looker Studio experience (closest to Google Analytics requirement)
Excel proficiency (explicitly listed in CV tools)
Degree in Management & Entrepreneurship (Master) — relevant qualification
Marketing analytics and ROI analysis (Intelligent Power Corporation: KPI tracking, ROI evidencing; Moli Media: audience analytics)
Data storytelling and structured insight reporting (HSBC: translated complex data into narratives; Hapag-Lloyd: user research data analysis)
Cross-functional collaboration with marketing and sales teams (multiple roles)
KPI framework design and performance reporting (HSBC)
Campaign performance analysis and competitor monitoring (Intelligent Power Corporation)
missing_skills: SQL proficiency — not mentioned in CV
Google Analytics experience — not explicitly mentioned (Looker Studio is related but not identical)
Statistical modelling: regression analysis — not mentioned
CRM analytics experience specifically for travel/tourism sector
core_responsibilities: Conceptualise, create and deliver data-driven analyses, reports and dashboards to support marketing initiatives
Analyse data from multiple sources to evaluate campaign performance, monitor KPIs and identify improvement areas
Support strategic decision-making by providing insights on target groups, market trends, and competitive landscapes
Identify potential enhancements and develop optimisation strategies for marketing efficiency
Review and assess effectiveness of marketing campaigns and provide actionable recommendations
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement improvements
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the Power BI PL-300 certification — this directly meets one of the listed required tools
Highlight the ROI analysis and campaign analytics work at Intelligent Power Corporation and Moli Media as evidence of marketing analytics competency
Emphasise the data storytelling and executive reporting experience from HSBC as evidence of analytical communication skills
Address the SQL gap honestly — if the candidate has any SQL exposure, include it; if not, note willingness to develop
The travel/tourism sector is a nice-to-have context; the candidate's international marketing background across multiple sectors is an advantage
summary: Match score is 45.5 (weak_match). This is the strongest match in this batch. The candidate's Power BI certification, marketing analytics experience (ROI analysis, KPI tracking, competitor monitoring), and data storytelling skills align well with the role. Key gaps are SQL proficiency and formal statistical modelling experience. Worth applying — the Power BI certification alone is a genuine differentiator and the marketing analytics track record across multiple sectors covers most of the core responsibilities.
